title: NATIONAL STANDARD FOR BOMB DISPOSAL SYSTEM
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

NATIONAL STANDARD FOR BOMB DISPOSAL SYSTEM

Posted On:
25 MAR 2026 3:34PM by PIB Delhi

As per available information, the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) has issued Indian Standards 19445:2025 on ‘Performance evaluation and Requirements’ of Bomb Disposal Systems on 24 December 2025. This standard specifies the qualitative requirements and related test methods applicable  for various  types  of  bomb  disposal  systems.   The  details  are  available on BIS website. This standard has been developed following extensive consultations with stakeholders to ensure that it meets the operational realities, safety considerations, and field-level requirements. It is available to all the user agencies, including manufacturers and security agencies, for adoption.

This  was  stated  by  the  Minister  of  State  in  the  Ministry  of  Home Affairs  Shri  Nityanand Rai  in  a  written  reply  to  a  question  in  the Rajya  Sabha.

*****

RK/RR/PR/PS/SC
